title: Sam's Unpacked Ice
description: Have you ever wanted to unpack your ice? Well now you can.
body:
![Unpack your Packed Ice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RQKzhjvC/images/989d0fc06443d91e529ad0f0a2517b08463f5d0e.png)
# Sam's Unpacked Ice
Have you ever packed your ice to much or mined up all that Blue Ice to descover you can't unpack it for that optimal block per distance in your nether highway? Well now you can with Sam's Unpacked Ice Mod.
